strategy: Hit with Death (+5%); he resists Life 50%.
Round 1 he Wings of Fate, putting a 20,000 Life DoT on every wizard (and a 20k heal on his side) that lasts the whole duel — then later he Incindiates to detonate that DoT for massive damage.
Strip that DoT with Triage/Mass Triage before he detonates it, or Shift/Detonate it away yourself.
Use Mass Feint, not single Feint — a single Feint makes him Swap Ward your traps onto you (or use Indemnity).
Blade and Mass Feint, remove the DoT, then land a Death hit before the Incindiate window.
cheatNotes: Late wizards eat a Lamassu (984) plus the 20,000-over-100-rounds Life DoT — join on time.
Round 1 he casts Wings of Fate: a 20,000 Life DoT on all wizards and a 20,000 heal on his side, both lasting the whole fight.
Both effects persist the entire duel unless removed.
Triage or Mass Triage removes the DoT — do this before he detonates it.
Shift or Detonate can also counter the DoT.
Put a single Feint on him and he Swap Wards your traps onto you — use Mass Feint or Indemnity.
Pet-cast traps trigger the swap too.
Mass Feint does NOT trigger it — use it safely.
He casts Incindiate to detonate the long DoT for massive damage — clear the DoT first.
